Home / Products / Pleated Insect Screen

Product Details

Pleated Insect Screen

A pleated mesh system for doors and windows where you want airflow and insect protection.

Typical use: Balcony door · Terrace · Garden exit

Pleated insect screens are especially convenient for balcony doors, terraces, and busy exits. The folding side-sliding system saves space and suits modern door profiles. Winsome offers this category for customers who want comfort, neat installation, and reliable insect protection for everyday living.

Request Consultation Call Winsome

Features

  • Pleated, side-sliding system
  • Suitable for balcony doors and terraces
  • Folds compactly when not in use
  • Custom-made to size

Benefits

  • Keeps insects out while allowing air movement
  • Convenient on frequently used doors
  • Space-efficient when open
  • Works with modern aluminium and uPVC systems

Colors

See the color options in the catalog below.

1 / 23

გოფრირებული ბადის თეთრი პროფილის ნიმუში

Questions

Frequently asked questions about this product

Is a pleated screen suitable for a balcony door? +

Yes. Pleated screens are among the most practical solutions for balcony and terrace doors where people pass through often. The mesh slides sideways and stacks to one side so it does not block the opening when the door is open. The barrier still keeps flies and mosquitoes out while fresh air circulates. Installation is fitted to the door frame without major structural changes in most cases. Winsome measures to ensure smooth travel along the full width.

Does the pleated screen fold to the side? +

Yes. Side-stacking folding is a key benefit of this system. The mesh gathers compactly at one end and stays out of the way when you need full passage—ideal for busy doorways where a fixed framed screen would be awkward. That makes daily use simpler for families and in commercial entries with frequent traffic. Track and brush seals are adjusted for even closure across the opening.
